oversightSurface.name: read-only stage health oversight
oversightSurface.purpose: Shows stage health, blockers, diagnosis, and attribution from existing evidence without becoming a required loop step.

escapeHatch.name: non-blocking stuck-loop escape-hatch
escapeHatch.purpose: Records optional operator stop/override provenance for a stuck loop while unrelated autonomous work remains free to continue.

tasteFeedback.name: fast taste/fun feedback capture
tasteFeedback.purpose: Captures human taste and fun notes as provenance by reusing the M57 curation and M58 playtest/fun-feel contracts; it never automates fun/taste verdicts.

reuseMilestoneRefs: M57 curation cockpit human selection provenance
M58 human fun/taste verdict remains Ring 2
boundary: Optional, non-blocking, read-only human channel for Era L M72: stage health, blocker, diagnosis, and attribution oversight read existing openchrome verdict, journal.md, ledger.jsonl, loop-coverage attribution, source-apply, and trust-gradient evidence only; the stuck-loop escape-hatch records provenance but does not block the autonomous loop; taste and fun feedback reuse M57/M58 provenance and never automate fun/taste or release go/no-go. No trusted writes, no source-apply authority, no auto-apply authority, no new verification engine, no new data plane, no new store, Rust remains the data plane, Elixir executor remains unchanged, #1 and #23 remain open.
